title: Misty World
description: Double dimension for life and research
body:
![Mist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uSUjKdPd/images/d3c4c1cd27c6957d11ddb06d9ee7ee6525e9a45d.png) 
### Misty World:
This is a new dimension that seems quite normal at first glance. However, one detail stands out clearly against the general background. In the distant past, something terrible had happened and divided the world into two parts. One remained habitable, while the second part turned out to be shrouded in a toxic atmosphere deadly to humans. For thousands of years, an acrid fog gnawed deep canyons in the Earth's crust, at the bottom of which a strange and dangerous life has arisen.

You will contemplate the seas of milky haze that enveloped the world and meet the dawns of life on the lonely islands that hold their ground in this long war.

To get to the dimension, you have to complete a small quest. Look into the achievements and, following step by step, you will finally open the portal to the Misty World.

<iframe width="770" height="433" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/QRAHvZfbQTU" title="Minecraft Mod: Misty World - Showcase" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Objectives:

The goal was to create a living, self-developing ecosystem, each element of which has its own life cycle and is closely related to the environment.
<details>
<summary>Features:</summary>

* New dimension (2 in 1)
* Toxic fog
* 5 climatic zones, plus a pair of special
* Over 20 new mobs
* Realistic tree growth
* Moisturized and fertilized soil
* Many small dungeons
* Unusual flora and fauna
</details>
<details>
<summary>In the plans:</summary>

* More plants
* Dungeons and other structures
* Toxic downlands
</details>
